name: feature.slides.agents
description: Slide Designer agent (ADR 0153 Phase 1). Turns a request into a structured slide deck rendered inline in the EXISTING chat artifact workbench — composes the AI chat + the feature.slides.nodes pack; no new chat surface. Pure-agent pack.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Slide Designer
agents.description: Turns a topic or outline into a structured slide deck rendered live in the artifact workbench. Uses openwop:feature.slides.nodes.render.
